treatment_information.specific_treatment: coil embolization of hepaticojejunostomy varices and portal venous stent thrombectomy
treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Right internal jugular venous access, portal venogram, balloon sweep through SMV, extension of TIPS stent with 6 cm x 10 mm Luminexx stent, 10 mm balloon dilation
treatment_information.treatment_response: Successful right internal jugular approach coil embolization of the hepaticojejunostomy varices; successful mechanical thrombectomy of the portal venous stent

treatment_timeline.event: CT scan showed thrombus within TIPS
Portal/SMV venography with stent thrombectomy and coil embolization of the varices recommended
Surgery performed to clean out the blood clot and coil off bleeding blood vessels

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Patient advised to have Coumadin levels checked regularly
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Expected to have a more long-lasting solution to stop the bloody bowel movements
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient expressed hope for improvement in condition and was instructed on medication adherence and follow-up appointments
